# Tenang Di Tengah Ribut — Sales Page

Preview website untuk ebook **Tenang Di Tengah Ribut** — panduan praktikal pengurusan stres untuk rakyat Malaysia.

🌐 **Live preview:** [tenang-sales.github.io](https://syafixit.github.io/tenang-sales/)

## Stack

- Pure HTML + CSS (no build step)
- Custom artwork: matplotlib (Atmospheric Cartography series)
- Mobile-responsive (1 column on phone)
- Ocean Breeze + dark editorial theme

## Local Preview

Just open `index.html` in browser — no server needed.
